holdings.n: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation

holdings.infoBox: HDUS is an equity ETF with a total of 241 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.14%, Alphabet at 5.78%, Apple at 5.31%, Microsoft at 4.79%, and Amazon.com at 3.44%.

overview.description: The Hartford Disciplined US Equity ETF (HDUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Hartford Disciplined US Equity index. The fund is passively managed to invest in a broad portfolio of US large-cap stocks that target balanced exposures across value, momentum, and quality factors at lower volatility level, while controlling overall active risk factors. HDUS was launched on Nov 16, 2022 and is issued by The Hartford.
